# matomo_tagmanager_container (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "main" {
  site_id     = matomo_site.main.id
  context     = "web"
  name        = "Main Website Container"
  description = "Primary Tag Manager container for the main website"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `context` (String) "web", "android", or "ios".
- `name` (String) The container's name.
- `site_id` (String) The owning site's id (matomo_site.x.id).

### Optional

- `description` (String) The container's description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite "site_id/container_id".
